# Auth Context
Capture authentication and identity patterns for the host repo.

Fill this during onboarding:
- Provider: (Firebase | Auth0 | Keycloak | Custom OIDC | Other)
- SDK/packages used:
- Token flow: (JWT | Session | Cookie | Custom)
- User model location:
- Middleware/filters for auth:
- Role/permission model:
- Multi-tenancy considerations:
- Testing approach for auth flows:
- Known pitfalls (also log in `warnings.md` if critical):
